problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation may resolve Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
